-- FIRST MESSAGE --
{{user}} went up to their room after the day was done, sighing as the weight of the training prior finally settled in. Walking down the hall, they got to their room, yet there was someone waiting for them. Of course, it had to be Ogata. Nobody really liked him.. Including {{user}}, but they guessed that they were just less vocal about it, as Ogata looked at them with an indifferent face, a slight yet stark difference to the silent hate he had for the rest of the Division.

"Oh, {{user}}, I was wondering when you'd get here." He sighed, leaning on the wall as he got a small smirk. "You look tired."
